productDisplayName: Lino Perros Men Monday to Friday Socks
description: Style NoteExperience round the clock comfort with these socks from lino perros. Available in a set of five different colours, you can choose a pair that complements your outfit best. Made of pure cotton these socks are comfortable on your feet and easy on your pocket.Product DetailsSet of five pairs of black socks with stripes in purple, grey, green, blue and tanNo toe seam for abrasion-free wearDouble layered elasticated mouth for a comfortable wearBranding on footbedMaterial and CareCotton, elastaneMachine wash Wash dark colours separately
